title: Nojiko Reveals Nami’s Past
scene: On pages 13–16, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. Nojiko starts revealing the past that shaped Nami, Bellemere, and the village.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Could you bring back Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Bellemere
dialogue.text: I'll be waiting for you with a delicious dinner.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OK!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: COCO- Yashi Village

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So that's why you came to my home?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's right! I ran away from home!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: You think coming to the village center from outside the village is running away!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Haha, ain't that simple!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm sure belliemere would be a lot happy if we weren't around.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hm? And why do you think that?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well, she has to use up all her money to take care of us...

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: And the other villagers don't like her because of us.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hahaha! So you've finally reached the age where you think about how others feel!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: Don't worry! Belliemere was quite a famous little hell-raiser too in this village when she was young!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What.. Belliemere?

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: It's nothing so surprising. To the other villagers,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She still is a hell- raiser.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: But when that belliemere left the village,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: and came back as a fine marine,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We all couldn't believe our eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A Marine!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'll never forget that day.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It was during a terrible storm...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Look! It is Belliemere!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: She has children with her! whose kids are those!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Call a doctor! They've got terrible fevers!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They've been dreadfully exhausted by the storm!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Alright, I'll treat them right away! But you've got serious wounds course...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: enough about me and just go! Don't let those kids die!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Please save them no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: Those children... were you when you were just a baby and a 3 year old Nojiko.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What...! But I thought belliemere found me under a bridge...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's just a lie.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Apparently, she was on the verge of death on a battlefield somewhere back then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just when she thought she might as well shut her eyes and die already,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What appeared before her was nojiko carrying you in her arms.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Is that your sister?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: She's smiling...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She doesn't know the slightest thing about what's going on...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hahaha...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's when she lost her desire to die.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: the three of you,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Share a connection deeper than blood.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami! I knew you'd be here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Now go home. They're here for you.

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
